About GlobalTick

GlobalTick is a static, multilingual calendar for public holidays, marketing dates and global events.

⌕
2026Public holidays · Events · Countdown intelligence

Data Resources

API

Nager.Date

Free public holiday JSON API for 100+ countries, no API key and CORS-ready.

Source
API

OpenHolidays

Open public and school holiday API with JSON and iCal output for supported countries.

Source
Open Data

Wikidata

Structured event, entity and history data accessible through public data interfaces.

Source
GlobalTick

Global holidays, marketing dates, sports, entertainment, tech events and countdowns for 2026.

AboutPrivacySitemapGitHub

Data references: Nager.Date, OpenHolidays, Wikidata, curated public event calendars. © 2026 GlobalTick.
